goals.title: Update canonical permission registry YAML and build generator
acceptance: permission-registry.yaml updated with all 8 confirmed decisions
generate-permission-enum.ts script reads YAML and emits TS + JS constants
npm run generate:permissions works and updates generated files
goals.evidence: payment.edit/payment.add split resolved in YAML; 39 permissions generated; TS + JS constants emitted

goals.title: Consolidate backend permission resolver and fix route guards
acceptance: /api/Permissions/resolve/:employeeId uses permissionService.resolveEffectivePermissions
Inline duplicate resolver removed
external_checkups.create and external_checkups.upload gated correctly
Payment patch uses payment.edit; proof uses payment.add
Export routes map to correct export permission strings

goals.title: Align frontend route guards and nav sidebar with registry
acceptance: /services and /service-catalog gated by services.view
NAV_PERMISSION entries verified against generated registry
ROUTE_PERMISSIONS constants use generated enum values
No hand-typed permission strings in route/nav guards

goals.title: Rebuild Permission Matrix from generated registry
acceptance: MatrixView.tsx iterates generated permission enum categories
No label-derived permission strings in matrix rows
i18n descriptions are lookups keyed by real permission string
Wildcard (*) users see all rows enabled without enumerating every string

goals.title: Implement self-lockout guard and Remember Me 60d
acceptance: Backend blocks admin self-revoke of permissions.edit without confirmation
Frontend shows confirmation modal before sending self-revoke
Login with rememberMe=true signs JWT with 60d expiry
Login without rememberMe keeps default expiry

goals.title: Create registry parity test and backend unit tests
acceptance: permissionRegistryParity.test.js scans code and YAML; fails on drift
permissionResolve.test.js asserts wildcard, empty scope, primary branch
selfLockout.test.js asserts block and confirmation bypass
authTokenLifetime.test.js asserts 60d expiry when rememberMe is true

goals.title: E2E tests, docs, changelog, and version bump
acceptance: Playwright specs for matrix, self-lockout, services route guard, external-checkups gate, payment gate, remember-me
docs/CHANGELOG.md updated with permission-domain repair entry
website/package.json version bumped (minor)
All existing auth/permissions E2E specs still pass
